name: Whisper Scribe
releaseNotes: Fixes local Whisper blank transcripts by using whisper.cpp auto language transcription correctly instead of language-detection-only mode. Adds explicit empty-result messages, clearer short-recording status, and multilingual local model download options while preserving OpenAI API mode.
description: Whisper Scribe records or imports audio on Android and turns speech into editable text. It supports high-quality OpenAI API transcription plus free local offline Whisper via whisper.cpp after downloading or importing a model, then lets users copy, save, or share transcripts.
